description: Groq (OpenAI-compatible Chat Completions) streaming with a function tool call handcrafted contract fixture. Validates v3 tool-input streaming and tool-call emission.

source.notes: Handcrafted fixture because upstream AI SDK does not ship Groq `*.chunks.txt` captures.

notes: Tool call arguments are streamed as string deltas; the final v3 tool-call input is a stringified JSON object.
